scripts.build:filters: bun run build:filters:bundle && bun run build:webview:bundle && bun run build:filters:postprocess
scripts.build:filters:bundle: bun build src/tsurlfilter-entry.ts --outfile dist/tsurlfilter.bundle.js --target browser --format iife --minify
scripts.build:webview:bundle: bun build src/webview-injected-entry.ts --outfile dist/webview-injected.bundle.js --target browser --format iife --minify
